creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

    www/osrm-backend: unbundle sol2

     - Remove the DEBUG option - it did nothing.
     - Trie to unbundle the included sol2 library.
     - Remove the dependency on Clang 18 for FreeBSD-Current.
     - Bump PORTREVISION

    PR:             283292
    MFH:            2025Q1
